name: FAILURE-LOG: append helper prepends new entry rather than overwriting (preserves history)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/append-failure-log.sh" --file "$PWD/FAILURE-LOG.md" --date 2026-05-05 --summary "new bug" && head -5 FAILURE-LOG.md | grep -E '^## 2026-05-05' 1>&2 && grep -E 'OLDER ENTRY' FAILURE-LOG.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf '# Failure Log

## 2026-05-04
- OLDER ENTRY
' > FAILURE-LOG.md
